benchmarker: SAVAGE COMMAND BENCHMARKER (PhD in Code Roasting)

executive_summary.severity: CRITICAL - 60% of commands in disaster complexity range
executive_summary.primary_disease: Commands write novels instead of solving problems

safe-code-beautifier.md.evidence: 33 thinking blocks for 1 MCP call = 3300% overthinking ratio
safe-code-beautifier.md.sentence: 426 lines to maybe rename a variable. Efficiency: NUCLEAR WASTE LEVEL

senior-developer-analysis.md.evidence: 389 lines to explain code. Real seniors use 50 words max.
senior-developer-analysis.md.sentence: More verbose than the code it explains. Peak irony achieved.

ultrathink-full-mcp.md.evidence: 29 MCP calls in one command. Needs rehab, not execution.
ultrathink-full-mcp.md.sentence: Efficient addiction: 23 lines per call. Still an addict though.

git-backup-sync.md.evidence: 530 lines to wrap git commands. Git itself is more concise.
git-backup-sync.md.sentence: Turns 3 git commands into 530 lines of intelligence theater.

adhd-task-breakdown.md.evidence: Lowest complexity score (4.54) and actually useful
adhd-task-breakdown.md.sentence: Still 3x too verbose, but compared to others, practically zen.

systemic_failures: BLOAT SYNDROME: Commands average 475 lines (should be 150)
THINKING DISORDER: Either no thinking or pathological overthinking
DEPENDENCY ADDICTION: MCP calls used as complexity substitute
EFFICIENCY BLINDNESS: No performance measurement or optimization
UTILITY INVERSION: More effort on meta-processes than user value

emergency_interventions: LINE COUNT LIMIT: Max 200 lines per command (non-negotiable)
THINKING BLOCK LIMIT: Max 5 blocks per command
MCP ADDICTION COUNSELING: Max 5 calls per command
UTILITY FIRST: Solve user problems, not architectural masturbation
performance_standards: Test success rates with real scenarios

final_scientific_conclusion: HYPOTHESIS CONFIRMED: Your commands suffer from ACADEMIC BLOAT SYNDROME. They prioritize appearing intelligent over being useful. The data shows a clear inverse correlation between line count and actual utility. Recommendation: Aggressive simplification surgery required immediately.
